text: What if the ocean could save our planet? Enter blue carbon: the carbon captured by coastal ecosystems like mangroves and seagrasses. These habitats can store up to 10 times more carbon than forests, but they’re disappearing. Studies show we’ve lost 50% of our mangroves, releasing massive carbon back into the atmosphere. Protecting blue carbon can not only combat climate change but also support biodiversity. Want to learn more about blue carbon? Hit that like button and follow for more!
